---
title: "Getting Started"
---

## Install

```bash
pip install uiao
```

Or from a local checkout during development:

```bash
git clone https://github.com/WhalerMike/uiao.git
cd uiao
pip install -e ".[dev]"
```

## Verify

```bash
uiao version
```

## First Commands

```bash
# Validate the bundled canon YAML
uiao validate

# Generate an OSCAL SSP from the bundled canon
uiao generate-ssp --out build/ssp.json

# Run a drift check
uiao drift-check

# Governance Operating System status
uiao gos status
```

Because the canon YAML is bundled inside the package, the `--canon-path`
option is optional and only needed to point at a non-default canon tree.
